name: line-plain-mid-pipeline
query:
5 | mul(2)
|~| this comment is identity
| add(1)

name: line-doc-on-let
line-doc-retrieve
query:
|~~| Doc text.
let foo = 42
| env | /foo | reify | /docs

name: line-doc-with-explicit-pipe-still-valid
query:
|~~| Doc text.
| let foo = 42
| env | /foo | reify | /docs

name: block-doc-on-let
query:
|~~ Multi-line doc
    spanning many lines. ~~|
let foo = 42
| 5 | foo

name: block-doc-retrieve
query:
|~~ Block doc here. ~~|
let foo = 42
| env | /foo | reify | /docs

name: two-line-docs-as-vec
query:
|~~| Doc one.
|~~| Doc two.
let foo = 42
| env | /foo | reify | /docs

name: three-line-docs-as-vec
query:
|~~| First.
|~~| Second.
|~~| Third.
let foo = 42
| env | /foo | reify | /docs | count

name: mixed-line-and-block-docs
query:
|~~| Line doc.
|~~ Block doc. ~~|
|~~| Another line.
let foo = 42
| env | /foo | reify | /docs | count

name: doc-block-preserves-newlines
query:
|~~ line one
line two ~~|
let foo = 42
| env | /foo | reify | /docs | first

name: doc-survives-shadowing-redeclare
query:
|~~| Old doc.
let foo = 1
|~~| New doc.
|~~| With second remark.
let foo = 2
| env | /foo | reify | /docs

name: comment-step-is-identity-on-pipevalue
query:
[1 2 3]
|~| this comment doesn't change pipeValue
| count

name: interleaved-plain-between-two-docs
query:
|~~| doc one
|~ separator ~|
|~~| doc two
let foo = 42
| reify(:foo) | /docs

name: multiple-interleaved-plains-among-docs
query:
|~~| a
|~ p1 ~|
|~~| b
|~ p2 ~|
|~~| c
let foo = 42
| reify(:foo) | /docs

name: block-doc-then-plain-then-line-doc
query:
|~~ block doc ~~|
|~ plain ~|
|~~| line doc
let bar = 99
| reify(:bar) | /docs
